title: Strait of Hormuz reopening may take weeks to ease shipping backlog and oil pressure
summary_full: The Strait of Hormuz is set to reopen after Iran and the U.S. sign a peace deal, but experts warn backlogs and security checks could delay normal shipping.
summary_public: The Strait of Hormuz is set to reopen after Iran and the U.S. sign a peace deal, but experts warn backlogs and security checks could delay normal shipping.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran and the U.S. sign a peace deal
